CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK( mfg_Orders_In_Last_30_Days__c ), mfg_Orders_In_Last_30_Days__c <= 0 ), 0, CEILING(mfg_Orders_In_Last_30_Days__c / 30) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculates average daily customer demand based on orders received in the last 30 days. Values are rounded up to ensure demand is never under-estimated for planning.
CustomField.label: Daily Demand (Units Per Day)
